Description:
Located in Sharm El-Sheikh, this hotel is located within Naama Bay. It has a private beach, 5 swimming pools, and offers air-conditioned rooms with satellite TV.

Rooms at the Novotel Sharm El-Sheikh have tiled floors and elegant furnishings. They come equipped with a mini-bar, as well as tea and coffee making facilities. Some rooms feature balconies with panoramic views.

The property has two wings "Beach Wing" located at the side of the beach and "Palm Wing" located on the other side across the road.

The Novotel has 3 restaurants that serve a variety of regional and international cuisine. Al Dente offers Italian fare and views of the Red Sea. The Bedu Bar provides live entertainment.

Guests can enjoy a relaxing massage, or visit the fitness center. The hotel also has a games room with table tennis, and a children’s playground.

Novotel Sharm El-Sheikh is less than 6.2 mi from Sharm el-Sheikh International Airport. Hotel Name: Amphoras Blu Ultra-All Inclusive Adults Only
Description:
Nestled along a private beach overlooking the Red Sea, Amphoras Blu Ultra All-Inclusive Hotel is an Adult Only (+16) offering the perfect blend of relaxation and adventure. The hotel lies just 6.8 mi from Sharm El Sheikh International Airport, 2.7 mi from Naama Bay, and 1.6 mi from Downtown.

Guests can indulge in rich international buffets at the Main Restaurant, or savor Mediterranean flavors at Mare Rosso, an à la carte fish restaurant located at Amphoras Blu. They can also explore three exquisite à la carte venues at the sister property Amphoras Beach, located alongside Amphoras Blu: Bella Vista, where Italian charm meets sea breeze; Red Dragon, serving Asian-inspired creations; and Mermaid, offering the freshest seafood.

Refreshing drinks and imported alcoholic beverages are available around the clock at the Welcome Bar, open 24/7, while the Beach Bar serves seaside treats, including late breakfast and ice cream. For poolside relaxation, the Palma Pool Bar offers imported alcoholic beverages and shisha in a laid-back ambiance.

Guests are welcomed with a fruit basket and cookies upon arrival. They can also enjoy a limited number of complimentary laundry pieces and free access to modern fitness facilities, including a padel court, gym, spinning classes, and CrossFit sessions.

With its perfect balance of relaxation, gastronomy, and recreation, Amphoras Blu promises an unforgettable Red Sea escape for guests aged 16 and above. | Couples in particular like the location – they rated it 9.1 for a two-person trip. | Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap | Children over 16 are welcome. | Children 18 and above will be charged as adults at this property. | To see correct prices and occupancy info, add the number and ages of children in your group to your search.

Tucked along the shores of Sharm El Sheikh, just 6.8 mi from the airport and 15 minutes from Naama Bay, Amphoras Beach offers a truly immersive Ultra All-Inclusive escape. With 484 elegant rooms and breathtaking views of the Red Sea, the resort is a favorite among snorkelers and divers thanks to its vibrant coral reefs. Six swimming pools and a peaceful sandy beach area provide the perfect backdrop for relaxation. 

From sunrise to late night, you can enjoy an abundance of culinary experiences. Daily buffets at Amphoras Restaurant are complemented by unlimited à la carte dinners at Bella Vista, Red Dragon, and Mermaid. A complimentary experience at Mare Rosso (Amphoras Blu) or Alexandrina (Amphoras Aqua) adds a special touch once per stay. Throughout the day, nine bars spread across the resort serve a wide selection of premium local and imported beverages including cocktails, wine, beer, fresh juices, soft drinks, and hot beverages. Snacks, ice cream and freshly baked treats are offered at various outlets to keep you satisfied at all hours. Layalina cafe offers a cozy space where you can enjoy complimentary shisha, traditional Egyptian snacks, hot and cold drinks, and local cocktails until the early hours. 

The experience continues with endless activities mini golf, padel, water slides, gym access, and lively entertainment from the animation team. Teens have their own dedicated hangout space with games and PlayStation 5, while adults can enjoy serene evenings across the many lounges and bars.

Hotel Name: Rixos Sharm El Sheikh - Adults Only 18 Plus
Description:
Rixos Sharm El Sheikh Resort is located on seafront among palm trees. It features free WiFi in all areas, a sandy beach, 7 swimming pools, 7 à-la-carte restaurants and 9 bars. Private butler services are offered at the private beach and pool cabanas at an added fee.

All rooms at Rixos come with a balcony or terrace overlooking the sea, garden or pool. Each room comes with a flat-screen TV, a mini-bar, a wardrobe and a telephone. Some rooms include a spacious seating area.

Guests can enjoy an authentic Turkish, Japanese, Seafood and Brazilian dining experience at
Lalezar, Sakura, Salt and La Churrascaria restaurants. Gusto restaurant serves Italian cuisine from à la carte menu, while Asian and Taj Mahal offer Asian and Indian dishes. The resort offers evening entertainment options, spacious entertainment area and open-air club X Lounge.

Guests can enjoy a dine-around concept at the 16 a la carte restaurants in both Rixos hotels.

Rixos’ spa offers a range of relaxation options, including full-body massages and facials. There is also a modern gym equipped with state-of-the-art cardiovascular equipment. The property also includes 3 water slides.

Exclusive Sports Club offers a range of work out programs like CrossFit, spinning, Pilates, Aqua Bike, Aqua Jumping and gravity Yoga. Other activities include tennis, beach volleyball and snorkeling.

Rixos Aquaventure Park features 6 towers with 23 water slides, large interactive Water Fountains, Aqua Tower, Lazy River and the Wave Pool.

Guests at Rixos Sharm El Sheikh Resort can enjoy Go Karts, Artificial Zoo, Carousel, Ferris Wheel  on site.

Naama Bay, with its promenade, is 14 mi away from Rixos Sharm El Sheikh. Sharm El Sheikh International Airport is 5 mi drive away. A complimentary shuttle bus is available to Naama Bay promenade.

Free access is available to Rixos Aquaventure Park for all Rixos Sharm El Sheikh guests.
